summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Prachurja e-commerce cart system. Backend APIs fully functional with 100% test success rate. Frontend cart functionality working well with minor UX overlay issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay blocks clicks on other elements when cart sidebar is open
ui_bugs.impact: Users cannot click other elements while cart sidebar is open, must close sidebar first

passed_tests: Backend: All 13 API tests passed (products, orders, contact, validation)
Add to Cart from product cards
Cart sidebar opens with correct items
Add to cart with custom quantity from product detail
Toast notifications on add to cart
